title: subworkflow - expand major outage downtime rollback to last known good
description: Enterprise expansion subworkflow for fear theme `major-outage-downtime` and pattern `rollback-to-last-known-good`.\n\nDesigned to improve workflow adoption by automating reliability, security, and governance controls with explicit wait and verification.
guide:
## 🧩 Enterprise Expansion Subworkflow

### 🎯 Enterprise Concern
- **major outage downtime**

### 🛠️ Pattern
- **rollback to last known good**

### ⚙️ Primary Action
- **dynatrace.aws.connector:ssm-get-automation-execution**

### ▶️ Execution Behavior
- ▶️ Execute action
- ⏳ Wait for stabilization
- ✅ Check terminal status and fail on unsuccessful outcome

### 🧠 Why This Matters
- Helps enterprise teams automate high-friction operational controls and reduce outage risk.

wait-for-action.name: wait-for-action
wait-for-action.description: Wait for action to reach terminal state.

check-status.name: check-status
check-status.description: Final status verification and fail-on-error gate.
